project_privacy_data_flows.description: User submits edited article content. Wikitext changes sent to MediaWiki edit API with CSRF token. Supports captcha verification for unregistered users. Edit summary included.

flow_steps.code: private fun doSave() { ... DeviceUtil.hideSoftKeyboard(this); viewModel.postEdit(isMinorEdit, watchThisPage, summary, text) }
flow_steps.details: User taps save button after editing article section. Edit text and summary captured from text editor.

flow_steps.code: object CsrfTokenClient { suspend fun getToken(wiki: WikiSite): String }
flow_steps.details: CSRF token acquired from MediaWiki API for edit authorization.

flow_steps.code: fun postEdit(isMinorEdit: Boolean?, watchThisPage: String, summaryText: String, editSectionText: String, ...) { ... val result = ServiceFactory.get(pageTitle.wikiSite).postEditSubmit(title = pageTitle.prefixedText, section = ..., summary = summaryText, text = editSectionText, baseRevId = currentRevision, token = csrfToken) }
flow_steps.details: Edited wikitext, section title, edit summary, base revision ID, and CSRF token sent to MediaWiki edit API.

flow_steps.code: @FormUrlEncoded @POST(MW_API_PREFIX + "action=edit") suspend fun postEditSubmit(@Field("title") title: String, @Field("section") section: String?, @Field("summary") summary: String, @Field("text") text: String?, @Field("baserevid") baseRevId: Long, @Field("token") token: String, ...)
flow_steps.details: Edit content posted to action=edit API. Includes title, section number, edited text, summary, base revision ID for conflict detection, optional captcha, and edit tags.

flow_steps.code: @FormUrlEncoded @POST(MW_API_PREFIX + "action=visualeditoredit") suspend fun postVisualEditorEdit(@Field("paction") action: String, @Field("page") title: String, @Field("token") token: String, ...)
flow_steps.details: Visual editor edits and image recommendation data sent via separate visualeditoredit API.

flow_steps.code: class EditAttemptStepEvent(private val event: EditAttemptStepInteractionEvent) : EventWithDt(STREAM_NAME)
flow_steps.details: Edit attempt lifecycle events (init, saveIntent, saveAttempt, saveSuccess, saveFailure) submitted to Event Platform with page title, editor interface type, user ID, and login status.

project_privacy_data_flows.description: User inserts images into articles from Commons or device gallery. Image file and metadata uploaded via InsertMedia flow.

flow_steps.details: User opens media insertion dialog while editing. Can search Commons for existing images.
Search query for Commons images sent to MediaWiki API.
